name: Aggression Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
4. Form the mixture into small balls, about the size of filberts or English walnuts.
5. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Using a small glass dish, flatten each ball by pressing down gently.
7. Dust the bottom of the glass with granulated sugar and press again to coat.
8. Repeat as needed for each ball.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes.
10. Allow the cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet before removing them.
